theorem ufd_or_inl :
  forall (P : Prop), forall (Q : Prop), forall (p : P), UfdOr P Q :=
  fun P => fun Q => fun p => fun (R : Prop) => fun (left : forall (p : P), R) => fun (right : forall (q : Q), R) => left p

theorem ufd_or_inr :
  forall (P : Prop), forall (Q : Prop), forall (q : Q), UfdOr P Q :=
  fun P => fun Q => fun q => fun (R : Prop) => fun (left : forall (p : P), R) => fun (right : forall (q : Q), R) => right q

theorem divides_intro.{u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (a : R), forall (b : R), forall (c : R), forall (h : @Eq.{u} R (mul a c) b), @Divides.{u} R mul a b :=
  fun R => fun mul => fun a => fun b => fun c => fun h => fun (Q : Prop) => fun (mk : forall (c_arg : R), forall (h_arg : @Eq.{u} R (mul a c_arg) b), Q) => mk c h

theorem divides_elim.{u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (a : R), forall (b : R), forall (hdiv : @Divides.{u} R mul a b), forall (Q : Prop), forall (mk : forall (c : R), forall (h : @Eq.{u} R (mul a c) b), Q), Q :=
  fun R => fun mul => fun a => fun b => fun hdiv => fun Q => fun mk => hdiv Q mk

theorem unit_intro.{u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (one : R), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (x : R), forall (inv : R), forall (right_inv : @Eq.{u} R (mul x inv) one), forall (left_inv : @Eq.{u} R (mul inv x) one), @Unit.{u} R one mul x :=
  fun R => fun one => fun mul => fun x => fun inv => fun right_inv => fun left_inv => fun (Q : Prop) => fun (mk : forall (inv_arg : R), forall (right_inv_arg : @Eq.{u} R (mul x inv_arg) one), forall (left_inv_arg : @Eq.{u} R (mul inv_arg x) one), Q) => mk inv right_inv left_inv

theorem associate_intro.{u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (one : R), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (a : R), forall (b : R), forall (unit : R), forall (unit_is_unit : @Unit.{u} R one mul unit), forall (h : @Eq.{u} R (mul unit a) b), @Associate.{u} R one mul a b :=
  fun R => fun one => fun mul => fun a => fun b => fun unit => fun unit_is_unit => fun h => fun (Q : Prop) => fun (mk : forall (unit_arg : R), forall (unit_is_unit_arg : @Unit.{u} R one mul unit_arg), forall (h_arg : @Eq.{u} R (mul unit_arg a) b), Q) => mk unit unit_is_unit h

theorem integral_domain_law_args_intro.{u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (zero : R), forall (one : R), forall (add : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (neg : forall (a : R), R), forall (sub : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (ring_laws : @RingLawArgs.{u} R zero one add neg sub mul), forall (zero_ne_one : UfdNot (@Eq.{u} R zero one)), forall (no_zero_divisors : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), forall (h : @Eq.{u} R (mul a b) zero), UfdOr (@Eq.{u} R a zero) (@Eq.{u} R b zero)), @IntegralDomainLawArgs.{u} R zero one add neg sub mul :=
  fun R => fun zero => fun one => fun add => fun neg => fun sub => fun mul => fun ring_laws => fun zero_ne_one => fun no_zero_divisors => fun (Q : Prop) => fun (mk : forall (ring_laws_arg : @RingLawArgs.{u} R zero one add neg sub mul), forall (zero_ne_one_arg : UfdNot (@Eq.{u} R zero one)), forall (no_zero_divisors_arg : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), forall (h : @Eq.{u} R (mul a b) zero), UfdOr (@Eq.{u} R a zero) (@Eq.{u} R b zero)), Q) => mk ring_laws zero_ne_one no_zero_divisors

theorem factorization_pred_intro.{f,u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (one : R), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (Factorization : Sort f), forall (factor_value : forall (fac : Factorization), R), forall (all_irreducible : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (x : R), forall (fac : Factorization), forall (represents : @Associate.{u} R one mul (factor_value fac) x), forall (factors_irreducible : all_irreducible fac), @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x fac :=
  fun R => fun one => fun mul => fun Factorization => fun factor_value => fun all_irreducible => fun x => fun fac => fun represents => fun factors_irreducible => fun (Q : Prop) => fun (mk : forall (represents_arg : @Associate.{u} R one mul (factor_value fac) x), forall (factors_irreducible_arg : all_irreducible fac), Q) => mk represents factors_irreducible

theorem prime_factorization_pred_intro.{f,u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (one : R), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (Factorization : Sort f), forall (factor_value : forall (fac : Factorization), R), forall (all_irreducible : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (all_prime : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (x : R), forall (fac : Factorization), forall (represents : @Associate.{u} R one mul (factor_value fac) x), forall (factors_irreducible : all_irreducible fac), forall (factors_prime : all_prime fac), @PrimeFactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime x fac :=
  fun R => fun one => fun mul => fun Factorization => fun factor_value => fun all_irreducible => fun all_prime => fun x => fun fac => fun represents => fun factors_irreducible => fun factors_prime => fun (Q : Prop) => fun (mk : forall (represents_arg : @Associate.{u} R one mul (factor_value fac) x), forall (factors_irreducible_arg : all_irreducible fac), forall (factors_prime_arg : all_prime fac), Q) => mk represents factors_irreducible factors_prime

theorem prime_factorization_to_factorization.{f,u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (one : R), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (Factorization : Sort f), forall (factor_value : forall (fac : Factorization), R), forall (all_irreducible : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (all_prime : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (x : R), forall (fac : Factorization), forall (hfac : @PrimeFactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime x fac), @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x fac :=
  fun R => fun one => fun mul => fun Factorization => fun factor_value => fun all_irreducible => fun all_prime => fun x => fun fac => fun hfac => hfac (@FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x fac) (fun (represents : @Associate.{u} R one mul (factor_value fac) x) => fun (factors_irreducible : all_irreducible fac) => fun (factors_prime : all_prime fac) => @factorization_pred_intro.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x fac represents factors_irreducible)

theorem prime_factorization_all_prime.{f,u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (one : R), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (Factorization : Sort f), forall (factor_value : forall (fac : Factorization), R), forall (all_irreducible : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (all_prime : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (x : R), forall (fac : Factorization), forall (hfac : @PrimeFactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime x fac), all_prime fac :=
  fun R => fun one => fun mul => fun Factorization => fun factor_value => fun all_irreducible => fun all_prime => fun x => fun fac => fun hfac => hfac (all_prime fac) (fun (represents : @Associate.{u} R one mul (factor_value fac) x) => fun (factors_irreducible : all_irreducible fac) => fun (factors_prime : all_prime fac) => factors_prime)

theorem ufd_domain_laws.{f,u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (zero : R), forall (one : R), forall (add : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (neg : forall (a : R), R), forall (sub : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (Factorization : Sort f), forall (factor_value : forall (fac : Factorization), R), forall (all_irreducible : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (all_prime : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (factor_equiv : forall (left : Factorization), forall (right : Factorization), Prop), forall (ufd_laws : @UniqueFactorizationDomainLawArgs.{f,u} R zero one add neg sub mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime factor_equiv), @IntegralDomainLawArgs.{u} R zero one add neg sub mul :=
  fun R => fun zero => fun one => fun add => fun neg => fun sub => fun mul => fun Factorization => fun factor_value => fun all_irreducible => fun all_prime => fun factor_equiv => fun ufd_laws => ufd_laws (@IntegralDomainLawArgs.{u} R zero one add neg sub mul) (fun (domain_laws : @IntegralDomainLawArgs.{u} R zero one add neg sub mul) => fun (factorization_exists : forall (x : R), forall (nonzero : @Nonzero.{u} R zero x), forall (nonunit : @Nonunit.{u} R one mul x), forall (S : Prop), forall (mk_exists : forall (fac : Factorization), forall (hfac : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x fac), S), S) => fun (factorization_unique : forall (x : R), forall (left : Factorization), forall (right : Factorization), forall (hleft : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x left), forall (hright : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x right), factor_equiv left right) => fun (irreducible_factors_prime : forall (fac : Factorization), forall (hirr : all_irreducible fac), all_prime fac) => domain_laws)

theorem ufd_factorization_exists.{f,u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (zero : R), forall (one : R), forall (add : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (neg : forall (a : R), R), forall (sub : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (Factorization : Sort f), forall (factor_value : forall (fac : Factorization), R), forall (all_irreducible : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (all_prime : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (factor_equiv : forall (left : Factorization), forall (right : Factorization), Prop), forall (ufd_laws : @UniqueFactorizationDomainLawArgs.{f,u} R zero one add neg sub mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime factor_equiv), forall (x : R), forall (nonzero : @Nonzero.{u} R zero x), forall (nonunit : @Nonunit.{u} R one mul x), forall (S : Prop), forall (mk_exists : forall (fac : Factorization), forall (hfac : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x fac), S), S :=
  fun R => fun zero => fun one => fun add => fun neg => fun sub => fun mul => fun Factorization => fun factor_value => fun all_irreducible => fun all_prime => fun factor_equiv => fun ufd_laws => fun x => fun nonzero => fun nonunit => fun S => fun mk_exists => ufd_laws S (fun (domain_laws : @IntegralDomainLawArgs.{u} R zero one add neg sub mul) => fun (factorization_exists : forall (x_arg : R), forall (nonzero_arg : @Nonzero.{u} R zero x_arg), forall (nonunit_arg : @Nonunit.{u} R one mul x_arg), forall (S_arg : Prop), forall (mk_exists_arg : forall (fac : Factorization), forall (hfac : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x_arg fac), S_arg), S_arg) => fun (factorization_unique : forall (x_arg : R), forall (left : Factorization), forall (right : Factorization), forall (hleft : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x_arg left), forall (hright : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x_arg right), factor_equiv left right) => fun (irreducible_factors_prime : forall (fac : Factorization), forall (hirr : all_irreducible fac), all_prime fac) => factorization_exists x nonzero nonunit S mk_exists)

theorem ufd_factorization_unique.{f,u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (zero : R), forall (one : R), forall (add : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (neg : forall (a : R), R), forall (sub : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (Factorization : Sort f), forall (factor_value : forall (fac : Factorization), R), forall (all_irreducible : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (all_prime : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (factor_equiv : forall (left : Factorization), forall (right : Factorization), Prop), forall (ufd_laws : @UniqueFactorizationDomainLawArgs.{f,u} R zero one add neg sub mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime factor_equiv), forall (x : R), forall (left : Factorization), forall (right : Factorization), forall (hleft : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x left), forall (hright : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x right), factor_equiv left right :=
  fun R => fun zero => fun one => fun add => fun neg => fun sub => fun mul => fun Factorization => fun factor_value => fun all_irreducible => fun all_prime => fun factor_equiv => fun ufd_laws => fun x => fun left => fun right => fun hleft => fun hright => ufd_laws (factor_equiv left right) (fun (domain_laws : @IntegralDomainLawArgs.{u} R zero one add neg sub mul) => fun (factorization_exists : forall (x_arg : R), forall (nonzero_arg : @Nonzero.{u} R zero x_arg), forall (nonunit_arg : @Nonunit.{u} R one mul x_arg), forall (S_arg : Prop), forall (mk_exists_arg : forall (fac : Factorization), forall (hfac : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x_arg fac), S_arg), S_arg) => fun (factorization_unique : forall (x_arg : R), forall (left_arg : Factorization), forall (right_arg : Factorization), forall (hleft_arg : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x_arg left_arg), forall (hright_arg : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x_arg right_arg), factor_equiv left_arg right_arg) => fun (irreducible_factors_prime : forall (fac : Factorization), forall (hirr : all_irreducible fac), all_prime fac) => factorization_unique x left right hleft hright)

theorem ufd_irreducible_factors_prime.{f,u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (zero : R), forall (one : R), forall (add : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (neg : forall (a : R), R), forall (sub : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (Factorization : Sort f), forall (factor_value : forall (fac : Factorization), R), forall (all_irreducible : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (all_prime : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (factor_equiv : forall (left : Factorization), forall (right : Factorization), Prop), forall (ufd_laws : @UniqueFactorizationDomainLawArgs.{f,u} R zero one add neg sub mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime factor_equiv), forall (fac : Factorization), forall (hirr : all_irreducible fac), all_prime fac :=
  fun R => fun zero => fun one => fun add => fun neg => fun sub => fun mul => fun Factorization => fun factor_value => fun all_irreducible => fun all_prime => fun factor_equiv => fun ufd_laws => fun fac => fun hirr => ufd_laws (all_prime fac) (fun (domain_laws : @IntegralDomainLawArgs.{u} R zero one add neg sub mul) => fun (factorization_exists : forall (x_arg : R), forall (nonzero_arg : @Nonzero.{u} R zero x_arg), forall (nonunit_arg : @Nonunit.{u} R one mul x_arg), forall (S_arg : Prop), forall (mk_exists_arg : forall (fac_arg : Factorization), forall (hfac : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x_arg fac_arg), S_arg), S_arg) => fun (factorization_unique : forall (x_arg : R), forall (left_arg : Factorization), forall (right_arg : Factorization), forall (hleft_arg : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x_arg left_arg), forall (hright_arg : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x_arg right_arg), factor_equiv left_arg right_arg) => fun (irreducible_factors_prime : forall (fac_arg : Factorization), forall (hirr_arg : all_irreducible fac_arg), all_prime fac_arg) => irreducible_factors_prime fac hirr)

theorem ufd_prime_factorization_exists.{f,u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (zero : R), forall (one : R), forall (add : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (neg : forall (a : R), R), forall (sub : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (Factorization : Sort f), forall (factor_value : forall (fac : Factorization), R), forall (all_irreducible : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (all_prime : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (factor_equiv : forall (left : Factorization), forall (right : Factorization), Prop), forall (ufd_laws : @UniqueFactorizationDomainLawArgs.{f,u} R zero one add neg sub mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime factor_equiv), forall (x : R), forall (nonzero : @Nonzero.{u} R zero x), forall (nonunit : @Nonunit.{u} R one mul x), forall (S : Prop), forall (mk_exists : forall (fac : Factorization), forall (hfac : @PrimeFactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime x fac), S), S :=
  fun R => fun zero => fun one => fun add => fun neg => fun sub => fun mul => fun Factorization => fun factor_value => fun all_irreducible => fun all_prime => fun factor_equiv => fun ufd_laws => fun x => fun nonzero => fun nonunit => fun S => fun mk_exists => @ufd_factorization_exists.{f,u} R zero one add neg sub mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime factor_equiv ufd_laws x nonzero nonunit S (fun (fac : Factorization) => fun (hfac : @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x fac) => hfac S (fun (represents : @Associate.{u} R one mul (factor_value fac) x) => fun (factors_irreducible : all_irreducible fac) => mk_exists fac (@prime_factorization_pred_intro.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime x fac represents factors_irreducible (@ufd_irreducible_factors_prime.{f,u} R zero one add neg sub mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime factor_equiv ufd_laws fac factors_irreducible))))

theorem ufd_prime_factorization_unique.{f,u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (zero : R), forall (one : R), forall (add : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (neg : forall (a : R), R), forall (sub : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (Factorization : Sort f), forall (factor_value : forall (fac : Factorization), R), forall (all_irreducible : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (all_prime : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (factor_equiv : forall (left : Factorization), forall (right : Factorization), Prop), forall (ufd_laws : @UniqueFactorizationDomainLawArgs.{f,u} R zero one add neg sub mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime factor_equiv), forall (x : R), forall (left : Factorization), forall (right : Factorization), forall (hleft : @PrimeFactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime x left), forall (hright : @PrimeFactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime x right), factor_equiv left right :=
  fun R => fun zero => fun one => fun add => fun neg => fun sub => fun mul => fun Factorization => fun factor_value => fun all_irreducible => fun all_prime => fun factor_equiv => fun ufd_laws => fun x => fun left => fun right => fun hleft => fun hright => @ufd_factorization_unique.{f,u} R zero one add neg sub mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime factor_equiv ufd_laws x left right (@prime_factorization_to_factorization.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime x left hleft) (@prime_factorization_to_factorization.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime x right hright)

theorem ufd_prime_factorization_theorem.{f,u} :
  forall (R : Sort u), forall (zero : R), forall (one : R), forall (add : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (neg : forall (a : R), R), forall (sub : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (mul : forall (a : R), forall (b : R), R), forall (Factorization : Sort f), forall (factor_value : forall (fac : Factorization), R), forall (all_irreducible : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (all_prime : forall (fac : Factorization), Prop), forall (factor_equiv : forall (left : Factorization), forall (right : Factorization), Prop), forall (ufd_laws : @UniqueFactorizationDomainLawArgs.{f,u} R zero one add neg sub mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime factor_equiv), @UfdPrimeFactorizationTheorem.{f,u} R zero one add neg sub mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime factor_equiv ufd_laws :=
  fun R => fun zero => fun one => fun add => fun neg => fun sub => fun mul => fun Factorization => fun factor_value => fun all_irreducible => fun all_prime => fun factor_equiv => fun ufd_laws => fun (Q : Prop) => fun (mk : forall (domain_laws : @IntegralDomainLawArgs.{u} R zero one add neg sub mul), forall (prime_factorization_exists : forall (x : R), forall (nonzero : @Nonzero.{u} R zero x), forall (nonunit : @Nonunit.{u} R one mul x), forall (S : Prop), forall (mk_exists : forall (fac : Factorization), forall (hfac : @PrimeFactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime x fac), S), S), forall (prime_factorization_unique : forall (x : R), forall (left : Factorization), forall (right : Factorization), forall (hleft : @PrimeFactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime x left), forall (hright : @PrimeFactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime x right), factor_equiv left right), forall (prime_factorization_all_prime : forall (x : R), forall (fac : Factorization), forall (hfac : @PrimeFactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime x fac), all_prime fac), forall (prime_factorization_to_factorization_arg : forall (x : R), forall (fac : Factorization), forall (hfac : @PrimeFactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime x fac), @FactorizationPred.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible x fac), Q) => mk (@ufd_domain_laws.{f,u} R zero one add neg sub mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime factor_equiv ufd_laws) (@ufd_prime_factorization_exists.{f,u} R zero one add neg sub mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime factor_equiv ufd_laws) (@ufd_prime_factorization_unique.{f,u} R zero one add neg sub mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime factor_equiv ufd_laws) (@prime_factorization_all_prime.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime) (@prime_factorization_to_factorization.{f,u} R one mul Factorization factor_value all_irreducible all_prime)
